src: Matter (formerly Project CHIP) creates more connections between more objects, simplifying development for manufacturers and increasing compatibility for consumers, guided by the Connectivity Standards Alliance.
ja: Matter（旧Project CHIP）は、Connectivity Standards Alliance が主導し、より多くのオブジェクト間の接続を増やすことで、メーカーの開発を簡素化し、消費者の互換性を高める。
